fields.summary: Provides methods for encoding images and animated image sequences in the WebP format.
fields.remarks:
<format type="text/markdown"><![CDATA[
## Remarks

`SKWebpEncoder` is a static utility class that encodes single frames and animated sequences
to the [WebP](https://developers.google.com/speed/webp) image format. It supports both lossy
and lossless compression via <xref:SkiaSharp.SKWebpEncoderOptions>.

Single-frame encoding is done with the `Encode` overloads, which accept an
<xref:SkiaSharp.SKPixmap> and return the encoded bytes as <xref:SkiaSharp.SKData> or write
them to a stream.

Animated WebP files can be produced with the `EncodeAnimated` overloads by passing a span
of <xref:SkiaSharp.SKWebpEncoderFrame> values, each of which holds a pixmap and a duration.

## Examples

```csharp
// Encode a single frame
using var pixmap = bitmap.PeekPixels();
using SKData? data = SKWebpEncoder.Encode(pixmap, SKWebpEncoderOptions.Default);
File.WriteAllBytes("image.webp", data!.ToArray());

// Encode an animated WebP
var frames = new[]
{
    new SKWebpEncoderFrame(frame1Bitmap, TimeSpan.FromMilliseconds(100)),
    new SKWebpEncoderFrame(frame2Bitmap, TimeSpan.FromMilliseconds(100)),
};
using SKData? animated = SKWebpEncoder.EncodeAnimated(frames, SKWebpEncoderOptions.Default);
```
]]></format>

fields.summary: Encodes the specified pixmap to a WebP-formatted <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKData" /> using the given options.
fields.returns: An <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKData" /> containing the WebP-encoded image, or <see langword="null" /> if encoding failed.

params.options: The encoding options controlling quality and compression.

entries.signature: public static SkiaSharp.SKData? Encode (SkiaSharp.SKPixmap src, SkiaSharp.SKWebpEncoderOptions options);

fields.summary: Encodes the specified pixmap to WebP and writes the result to a <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKWStream" />.
fields.returns: <see langword="true" /> if the image was encoded and written successfully; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.

params.options: The encoding options controlling quality and compression.
params.dst: The destination stream that receives the encoded WebP data.

entries.signature: public static bool Encode (SkiaSharp.SKWStream dst, SkiaSharp.SKPixmap src, SkiaSharp.SKWebpEncoderOptions options);

fields.summary: Encodes the specified pixmap to WebP and writes the result to a <see cref="T:System.IO.Stream" />.
fields.returns: <see langword="true" /> if the image was encoded and written successfully; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.

params.options: The encoding options controlling quality and compression.
params.dst: The destination stream that receives the encoded WebP data.

entries.signature: public static bool Encode (System.IO.Stream dst, SkiaSharp.SKPixmap src, SkiaSharp.SKWebpEncoderOptions options);

fields.summary: Encodes a sequence of frames into an animated WebP <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKData" /> using the given options.
fields.returns: An <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKData" /> containing the animated WebP data, or <see langword="null" /> if encoding failed.

params.options: The encoding options controlling quality and compression.
params.frames: The sequence of frames to encode, each with an image and a display duration.

entries.signature: public static SkiaSharp.SKData? EncodeAnimated (System.ReadOnlySpan<SkiaSharp.SKWebpEncoderFrame> frames, SkiaSharp.SKWebpEncoderOptions options);

fields.summary: Encodes a sequence of frames into an animated WebP and writes the result to a <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKWStream" />.
fields.returns: <see langword="true" /> if the animated image was encoded and written successfully; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.

params.frames: The sequence of frames to encode.
params.dst: The destination stream that receives the encoded animated WebP data.
params.options: The encoding options controlling quality and compression.

entries.signature: public static bool EncodeAnimated (SkiaSharp.SKWStream dst, System.ReadOnlySpan<SkiaSharp.SKWebpEncoderFrame> frames, SkiaSharp.SKWebpEncoderOptions options);

fields.summary: Encodes a sequence of frames into an animated WebP and writes the result to a <see cref="T:System.IO.Stream" />.
fields.returns: <see langword="true" /> if the animated image was encoded and written successfully; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.

params.frames: The sequence of frames to encode.
params.dst: The destination stream that receives the encoded animated WebP data.
params.options: The encoding options controlling quality and compression.

entries.signature: public static bool EncodeAnimated (System.IO.Stream dst, System.ReadOnlySpan<SkiaSharp.SKWebpEncoderFrame> frames, SkiaSharp.SKWebpEncoderOptions options);
